---
title: "Splice"
sidebar: references
---

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_references.py; edit specs/dasdae-inventory.yml instead. -->

Fused or mechanical splice between optical fiber segments.

## Attributes

| Name | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `optical_length` | float | Splice optical length in meters, commonly zero or negligible. |
| `name` | str | Human-readable splice name. |
| `container` | [Enclosure](Enclosure.qmd) \| None | Optional enclosure housing this splice. |
| `splice_type` | str | Splice type, such as fusion or mechanical. |
| `insertion_loss` | float \| None | Insertion loss in dB, when known. |
| `notes` | str | Additional notes. |

## Contains

_None._

## Contained By

- [OpticalComponent](OpticalComponent.qmd)

## References

- uses [Enclosure](Enclosure.qmd)

## Referenced By

_None._
